heading: Provisions as controlling over other laws
label: 1443 Provisions as controlling over other laws
text: Insofar as the provisions of any other law are inconsistent with the provisions of this Act, the provisions of this Act shall be controlling.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , known as the Housing Act of 1949, which is classified principally to this chapter (§ 1441 et seq.). For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.act July 15, 1949, ch. 33863 Stat. 413section 1441 of this title
